fatal.title: Dead As Battle could not initialize.
fatal.description: Open the developer console for the crash details and review the bootstrap pipeline.

validation.missingCredentials: Enter your email or nickname and password to continue.

errors.invalidCredentials: Email, nickname, or password is incorrect.
errors.backendUnavailable: The launcher could not reach the authentication service.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again.
errors.rememberDeviceUnavailable: Electron secure storage is unavailable on this device.
errors.sessionPersistenceFailed: The session was created, but the launcher could not secure it locally.
errors.requestInvalid: Review the submitted data and try again.
errors.default: Authentication could not be completed right now.

hero.title: The proving grounds open only to authenticated challengers.
hero.summary: Enter the launcher through the first real secure access flow. Trusted devices stay linked for 30 days. Shared machines fall back to session-only access automatically.

rules.uncheckedDeviceValue: Session cleared when the launcher closes

intro.title: Sign in
intro.summary: Use your email or nickname to enter the launcher and reach the authenticated home screen.

form.rememberHintSupported: The refresh token is stored in Electron secure storage and reused for up to 30 days.
form.rememberHintUnsupported: Persistent secure storage is only available inside the Electron launcher.

pt-BR.label: Brazil (Portuguese)
pt-BR.description: Load the launcher and game in Brazilian Portuguese.

en.label: United States (English)
en.description: Load the launcher and game in English.

cards.title: Build the active eight-card roster
cards.summary: Browse every champion in the current catalog, inspect lore and combat identity, unlock new entries with shards, and keep the active deck synced to the database.
cards.empty: Adjust the search or filter to surface a different loadout option.

settings.title: Launcher settings
settings.summary: Tune the display stack, audio mix, and account access from one control board.

video.title: Video settings
video.summary: Arm fullscreen and resolution profiles for the launcher viewport.

fullscreen.label: Fullscreen
fullscreen.description: Push the launcher into an immersive presentation layer.

resolution.label: Resolution
resolution.description: Choose the display profile the launcher should target.

audio.title: Audio settings
audio.summary: Balance the soundtrack and interface impact without leaving the launcher.

musicToggle.label: Launcher music
musicToggle.description: Mute or restore the menu soundtrack without leaving settings.

sfxVolume.label: SFX volume
sfxVolume.description: Controls hover, confirm, and notification cues.

account.title: Account settings
account.summary: Stage identity updates and secure credential changes.

name.label: Change name
name.description: Update the display name shown across the launcher.

email.label: Change email
email.description: Queue a new address for secure account access.

password.label: Change password
password.description: Stage a new password for future sign-ins.

account.dangerSummary: Deleting the account is permanent and signs every linked device out immediately.
account.confirmSummary: This permanently removes launcher access, profile identity, and saved session bindings for this account.

feedback.fullscreenUnsupported: Fullscreen switching is unavailable in this build of the launcher.
feedback.resolutionUnsupported: Resolution switching is unavailable in this build of the launcher.
feedback.emailUnavailable: Secure email changes are not wired into this build yet.
feedback.passwordUnavailable: Secure password changes are not wired into this build yet.
feedback.deleteUnavailable: Account deletion is not connected to the backend yet.
feedback.nameInvalid: Enter a display name with at least 2 characters.
feedback.passwordInvalid: Enter a password with at least 8 characters.
feedback.genericFailure: The requested settings action could not be completed.

home.friendsEmpty: No friends connected to your launcher yet.

globalChat.title: Launcher chatter
globalChat.connectedSummary: Authenticated fighters are talking in real time across the launcher.
globalChat.disconnectedSummary: Realtime link is down. History remains visible while the channel reconnects.
globalChat.empty: The channel is quiet. Break the silence first.
globalChat.placeholder: Send a message to the global launcher channel.
globalChat.unavailable: Global chat is unavailable right now.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.summary: {{count}} unread notifications in your launcher feed.
notifications.empty: Your feed is clear for now.

directory.title: Players online across the launcher
directory.summary: Search by nickname, filter presence, inspect public profiles, and turn the launcher into a real shared space.
directory.searchPlaceholder: Search by nickname or display name
directory.empty: No players match the current search.

friends.title: Active squad
friends.summary: Review your friend list, track presence, and open public profiles without leaving the social hub.
friends.empty: No friends yet. Start by scouting the global directory.

requests.title: Pending requests
requests.summary: Manage incoming requests and outgoing invites in one board with quick actions.

profile.sectionSummary: This panel exposes only player-facing data: nickname, display name, avatar, public presence, and join timing. Private account and technical fields stay hidden.
profile.empty: Select a player to inspect their public profile.

errors.alreadyFriends: You are already friends with this player.
errors.requestAlreadySent: A request is already pending for this player.
errors.requestAlreadyReceived: This player already sent you a request. Accept it from your queue.
errors.selfRequest: You cannot send a friend request to yourself.
errors.userNotFound: Player profile could not be found.
errors.requestNotFound: This social action is no longer available.
errors.forbiddenAction: You cannot perform this social action.

profile.summary: Your battle identity inside the launcher. Alias, portrait, presence, language and trusted-device sync live here.

hero.nicknameLocked: Nickname is permanent once your account is created.

profile.overviewSummary: A clean profile surface for the player. Rank, collection and match history can plug into this layout later without exposing session internals.

launcherStatus.label: Launcher access
launcherStatus.meta: Current access state for this launcher session.

trustedDevice.label: Trusted device
trustedDevice.meta: Friendly device-saving status for the launcher.

currentDevice.label: Current device
currentDevice.meta: The device currently linked to this session.

language.label: Current language
language.meta: Language active across the launcher interface.

future.summary: This profile area is prepared for rank, owned champions, progression, match history and linked-device management.

profile.devicesSummary: Trusted-device state and launcher bond stay readable here. Raw device identifiers and session internals remain hidden.

avatar.previewSummary: Check how your avatar looks in the profile frame before saving it.

nameEditor.label: Player Identity
nameEditor.hint: Your nickname appears beneath your display name across the launcher interface.

feedback.invalidName: Enter a valid display name with at least 2 characters.
feedback.invalidAvatarType: Choose a PNG, JPG or WEBP image.
feedback.avatarTooLarge: Profile photo must be 5 MB or smaller.

system.title: Launcher and device
system.summary: Operating system, launcher runtime and device access live here instead of the player profile.

osVersion.label: OS version
osVersion.meta: Version reported by the operating system.

launcherRuntime.label: Launcher runtime
launcherRuntime.meta: Electron, Chrome and Node versions powering this launcher.

trustedAccess.label: Trusted access
trustedAccess.meta: Current remembered-device mode for this account.

currentDevice.label: Current device
currentDevice.meta: Device record linked to this desktop session.

lastActive.label: Last active
lastActive.meta: Most recent device activity recorded for your account.

list.summary: Recent launcher devices saved for this account.

footer.empty: No global messages yet. Be the first to talk.

exitModal.title: End session or close the launcher
exitModal.body: {{userLabel}} is still authenticated. Choose whether to log out and return to the login screen, or close the launcher now.

game.title: Arena connection established
game.summary: The launcher flow now reaches the game entry point. This screen holds the transition while the real match runtime is wired in during the next phase.

product.title: Dead As Battle
product.homeHeadline: The veil between worlds grows thin. Choose your champion.
product.homeSummary: Legends from shattered dimensions converge in an arena of ancient power. Forge alliances, master forbidden arts, and claim dominion across the Multiverse.
